_comment: Committed REGRESSION FLOORS for the deterministic MOCK (keyword) baseline, per dataset. These are NOT a quality claim: the mock scores POORLY on realistic resumes (coordinator) on purpose — that gap is why the Claude engine exists. CI runs `eval_accuracy.py --check` and FAILS if a change pushes a metric past one of these floors. Floors carry slack for cross-version (scipy) jitter; tighten/loosen DELIBERATELY when you intend to move the baseline. Measured 2026-06-21 with RM mock backend: coordinator = acc 0.25 / within1 0.542 / spearman -0.097 / mae 47.9; labeled = acc 1.0 / within1 1.0 / spearman 0.975 / mae 8.61.

labeled.role: clear-cut seed; pipeline smoke/sanity only (NOT real-world accuracy)
